creator: dhorn2000@gmail.com
text:
Performing a clean build from /usr/ports/emulators/open-vm-tools/ seems to fix the problem.  I will continue to monitor once the next pkg build cycle happens for 14 and see if the problem persists.

I'm unsure what the variable is other than my kernel may be slightly out of sync with whatever kernel sources were used for the pkg build for the 14 repo from when I installed the package.

`pkg config abi` reports:
   FreeBSD:14:amd64

Apologies on the attachment naming, I thought the filenames would be visible.
